title: Master's Program in Health Management Application and Fees
content:
Master's Program in Health Management Application and Fees

2025-2026 Spring Semester online application deadline: December 15, 2025

Application Deadline: Sunday, January 25, 2026

Results Announcement Date: Wednesday, January 28, 2026

Main List Registration Deadlines: January 28 - February 4, 2026

Reserve List Registration Deadlines: February 5 - 13, 2026

Click here

for Online Pre-Registration Link.

ALES Score Type:

EQUAL WEIGHT (EA)

Dear candidate students;

In the Spring semester of the 2025-2026 Academic Year, there will be no science exam in our Master's Programs;

1) In our thesis programs, 65% of ALES in Equal Weight score type, 35% of undergraduate graduation grade point average,

2) In non-thesis programs, 50% of the undergraduate graduation grade and 50% of the relevant score type ALES, if any*, will be evaluated.

*(If the candidates applying to non-thesis programs do not have ALES scores, they will be evaluated as 55 points.)

The applications of the candidates who do not apply online, do not graduate during the application, and do not upload their ALES document and their identity information to the application system will be deemed invalid.

- Original or certified copy of the undergraduate diploma

-Original or certified copy of the undergraduate transcript (transcript)

-ALES result document of at least 55 points from Equal Weight type, taken within the last five years (for Thesis Program)

-Copy of identity card

-Photo (2 Pieces)

SPECIAL CONDITIONS FOR CANDIDATES:

-ALES result document for thesis program applications;

Equal Weight at least 55 points

-Applicants will be selected in order of success.

TUITION FEES:

https://uskudar.edu.tr/tr/yuksek-lisans-ucretleri
